name: Natalie Aucoin
subtitle: documentary filmmaker · the pause self

ultimate_ability.label: The Page Folded Shut
ultimate_ability.description: Once per game. Close a page in a moment when your hand wants to write on it: cancel one impulse-action about to fire. Discard the top gravity card without drawing it; freeze the SUSPENSION/MOONDRIFT track for the turn.

notes: Natalie's hand · used for BOTH Hanged Man (at simon_apartment) and Moon (at static_drive_in). Second stat: SUSPENSION (hanged_man) or MOONDRIFT (moon). Scenarios override starting_hand per-scenario; the hanged-man starters are the default here. Moon starters via setup starting_hand: pop_corn/pour_soda/watch_screen/read_static.
